title: Neste Signs a New EUR 1.3 Billion Revolving Credit Facility
content:
Neste has signed a new EUR 1.3 billion multi-currency revolving credit facility with a syndicate of 13 core relationship banks. The new facility refinances the Group's existing EUR 1.2 billion facility dated December 2019, and can be used for general corporate purposes. The facility has a tenor of 5 years with two 1-year extension options subject to approval by individual lenders.

With renewables nameplate capacity of 5.5 million tons, Neste is the worldâ€™s leading producer of sustainable aviation fuel and renewable diesel. The company refines renewable fuels on three continents.
author: Analysts Account
